title: Playstation Achievement SFX
description:
This Resourcepack replaces the Achievement SFX with the playstation Trophy SFX!

(It also replaces the recipe unlock sfx)
body:
This is my first Resourcepack! I'm really happy about it I hope you Enjoy it!

This Resourcepack replaces the Achievement sound effect with The Playstation Trophies sound effect! Get a purple achievement (It's platinum, pretty cool I know)

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b30c8f25212de076656b6d2b1eb24e6c938b59ab.jpeg)
